name: Spicy Noodle Soup

ingredients.item: medium chayote, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
medium carrot, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
medium corncob, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick rounds
small jicama, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
medium apple or pear, peeled and cut into 1½-inch (4 cm) cubes
minced lemongrass, plus 5 to 8 lemongrass stalks, trimmed and bruised
mushrooms (straw, shiitake, enoki, or beech), stems trimmed and cut into bite-size pieces
dried rice vermicelli noodles or 2¼ pounds (1 kg) fresh rice vermicelli noodles
leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn, for serving
green herbs, (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil), chopped, for serving
banana blossom, prepped and shredded, for serving
lime, cut into wedges, for serving

method: Place chayote, carrot, corn, jicama, and apple in a large stockpot, and then add the water, rock sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil, and then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, until vegetables are sweet to the taste (about 1 hour).

Heat ¼ cup (60 ml) of the oil in a small skillet over medium-low heat. When hot, add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain, and then cut into slices.

Heat the remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) oil in a medium skillet over low heat. When hot, add minced lemongrass, garlic, leek, chili pepper, bruised lemongrass stalks, chili flakes, sugar, and stock powder. Cook and stir until slightly golden (about 3 minutes). Remove from heat.
Using tongs or chopsticks, transfer lemongrass stalks to the large pot of vegetables. Reserve half of the cooked mixture in a small bowl to serve as a condiment with each bowl of soup.

Add the mock beef slices and mushrooms to the remaining half of mixture in the skillet and cook and stir over medium-low heat until tender (2 to 3 minutes). Add tofu slices, stir gently, and then remove from heat and set aside.
If using dried vermicelli, cook it following the package instructions. If using fresh, quickly blanch it in hot water if it has been refrigerated.
Fill one-third of each serving bowl with rice vermicelli noodles, and then top with mushrooms, tofu, and mock beef slices. Ladle hot broth over the top and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve with a platter of lettuce, herbs, bean sprouts, banana blossom, and lime wedges, along with the reserved condiment mixture.
